artPrompt: The dramatic instant a heavy iron sewer grate is wrenched up and flung aside, sickly green light and bioluminescent steam venting from the black hole as a glistening sludge-limb erupts upward to join a brawl. Rusted pipes and toxic puddles ring the breach under a bruised stormy sky. The bursting limb and torn grate climb the wide landscape frame from a dark drain. Wide 4:3 landscape, Gruul murky green and rust red, toxic menace, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Sewer Grate, Pried Open
text: Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control. (Something climbs out to help. You don't ask what.)
flavorText: The bolts were rated for a quarter ton. The thing underneath was not.
